opinion.h2: Madalyn Murray O'HAIR et al. v. Thomas O. PAINE et al. No. 1190.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: James H. Anderson, Jr., for appellants Society of Separationists, Inc ., and others.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.[ O'Hair v. Paine (1970) ]
